meta.name: Miles That Matter
meta.description: Hit the road with three of basketball's brightest stars at different stages of their careers: Azzi Fudd, Trey McKenney, and Napheesa Collier. Each episode offers an intimate look at the athlete's life beyond the arena as they navigate their hometowns alongside the family and coaches who helped pave their way. From the school gyms of Flint and Arlington to the farm roads of Missouri, we explore the legacy, the community, and the miles that made them into champions.
